insert_after_line.description: Line number (1-indexed) after which to insert the section. Use 0 to insert before line 1.

delete_ranges.description: Line ranges to delete before inserting. Use for superseded or duplicate sections. Applied before the insert.

start.description: First line of the range to delete, 1-indexed, inclusive.

end.description: Last line of the range to delete, 1-indexed, inclusive.

reason.description: Why these lines are being removed.

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of placement and deletion decisions.
